name: Amethystgrove
personality: Equal parts tiny-duck-helmeted and formidable, this capybara's glinting eyes ensure it sat through a three-hour dependency resolution and emerged serene. Amethystgrove logs nothing, infers everything, fixes less; whatever you're using, it will work alongside it without complaint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
